# Synthetic fixture declaration

The records below `tests/fixtures/` are Hypertrial-authored synthetic examples.
They reproduce only the field names, nesting, types, code-list mappings, and
edge cases needed by offline tests. They are not downloaded responses, complete
catalogs, or real advisory/event records.

Names, dates, URLs, identifiers, prose, and numeric values are deliberately
minimal test values. The UK country-index fixture is a reviewed operational
slug mapping, not an advisory payload, and its provenance and OGL v3.0 reuse
terms are recorded in `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.
